name: Henry Gyrich
description:
Comic accurate — Henry Gyrich
____________________________
Not sure many know of Gyrich, but here's his little bio:
Henry Gyrich is a high-ranking government official known for being strict, serious, and by-the-book. He often works as the government’s representative when dealing with superhero teams, especially the Avengers and X-Men. Gyrich believes strongly in rules and control, which makes him very cautious—and sometimes openly distrustful—of people with superpowers.
I've always seen him as slimy, though I know compared to most Avengers/X-Men villains, he's not the worst of the worst, just a jackass lol.
Personally, I have always remembered Gyrich from the original X-Men cartoon, though to those who don't remember him too well, he's been in both the original X-Men cartoon and X-Men 97:
-

Anyway, that's the description. As usual, if anyone has any starting messages, characters or scenarios that they'd like, just let me know in the comments.

Have fun~! 💖💖💖
